posts.author: david.lowe (David Lowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello Team, I have noticed that the new Product item view widget (loving the improvements BTY) has a limitation on the number of items that can be displayed in the “add item” field is 500! I have a Product and Services board that has well over 500 items. Is there a way that this limitation can be removed? I am sure that we would not be the only company that would have this situation.
It’s not all bad as we are able to open the Quotes and Invoice widget and edit the product lines which allow for more than the limited 500 items.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to management many more that only 500 selectable items when add a new product line to the product view. This would streamline the quoting and invoicing process and allow the viewing of all products for the item.
